summary: Iteration 149: Enjoy Page Redesign - All features verified working. Fixed RSVP data format issue.

backend_api_tests.test_enjoy_experiences_have_required_fie: PASS - id, name, description, experience_type, city, image

frontend_ui_tests.goal_buttons: PASS - All 8 goal buttons found (Events, Trails, Playdates, Pet Cafés, Workshops, Wellness, Photoshoots, Other)
frontend_ui_tests.concierge_experiences: PASS - 4 experience cards (Event Scout, Adventure Architect, Social Circle Creator, Pet-Friendly Dining Curator)
frontend_ui_tests.events_grid: PASS - 6 event cards with images, dates, prices, RSVP buttons
frontend_ui_tests.rsvp_modal: PASS - Opens on RSVP click, has pet name/breed fields, submit button
frontend_ui_tests.rsvp_flow: PASS - RSVP creates ticket, shows success toast with ticket ID
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - No horizontal overflow, proper layout

events_grid.rsvp_buttons: All events have RSVP buttons with data-testid

bugs_fixed.description: Frontend was sending 'pet_names' (plural) but backend expected 'pet_name' (singular)
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated EnjoyPage.jsx submitRsvp function to send correct field names

bugs_fixed.description: Was passing string instead of result object, causing 'Ticket: undefined' in toast
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to pass result object from createEnjoyRSVP

critical_code_review_comments: Enjoy page redesign matches Care/Travel page design standards
All experiences now have images (seed function updated)
RSVP flow properly integrated with unified flow (Notification → Service Desk → Unified Inbox)
WhatsApp button correctly implemented with data-testid
Mobile responsiveness is good with no horizontal overflow
seed_data_creation: None - existing seed data has images
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enjoy page redesign complete and verified. All features working: red/rose hero, social proof, goal buttons, transformation stories, concierge experiences with images, events grid with images and RSVP, WhatsApp button. Fixed RSVP data format issue (pet_name vs pet_names). RSVP flow creates proper tickets with IDs shown in toast.
